title: Bitter Juicy Croatian Brussels Sprouts Stir-fry
description: A one-pot croatian dish featuring bitter and juicy brussels sprouts prepared in a nut-free-friendly way with just the right amount of spice for a quick and easy dinner.

ingredients.name: 1 cup fresh Brussels sprouts, halved
ingredients.notes: Choose those that are slightly bitter for added depth of flavor

ingredients.name: Freshly grated nutmeg (optional)
ingredients.notes: For added zest, but not necessary

ingredients.name: 1 tsp paprika or other spices of choice (optional)
ingredients.notes: To enhance the bitterness and juiciness

instructions: Preheat your pressure cooker to high heat.
Wash and dry Brussels sprouts, then cut them in half.
In a bowl, mix olive oil, minced garlic, lemon juice, salt, pepper, nutmeg (if using), and paprika (if using).
Add halved Brussels sprouts to the bowl with the seasoning mixture. Toss well until all brussels sprouts are evenly coated.
Pour the seasoned brussels sprouts into the preheated pressure cooker.
Close the lid and secure the valve to the sealing position. Cook on high for 15 minutes under pressure, then quick-release any remaining steam.
Taste test, adjust seasoning with more salt or lemon juice if needed before serving.
Serve hot as a side dish with grilled meats or as an appetizer.
